calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Drexel A. Bradshaw, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Norma Capule, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Billy Dela Rosa.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on May 3, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Norma Capule, and against defendant Billy Dela Rosa as follows:

Holdover Damages - $810.00.
Costs - $330.00.

Total - $1,140.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Norma Capule is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 111 whipple Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94112. The rental agreement is canceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, May 12, 2010:
Drexel A. Bradshaw, counsel for plaintiff Norma Capule, who is also present;
Daniel Zlatnick and Paul Findley, limited scope counsel(s) for defendant Billey R. Dela Rosa, who is also present this day

Settlement conference held in room 304B before Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick. Case does not settle. The May 17, 2010 trial date remains.

Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (218)
